title: McKesson Corporation Announces First-Quarter Fiscal 2024 Earnings Release Date
text: IRVING, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--McKesson Corporation (NYSE: MCK) will release its first-quarter fiscal 2024 financial results after market close on Wednesday, August 2, 2023. The company will host a live webcast of the earnings conference call for investors at 4:30 PM Eastern Time to review its financial results. The live webcast will be available on McKesson's Investor Relations website at http://investor.mckesson.com, along with the company's earnings release, financial tables and slide prese.

title: McKesson's (MCK) Latest Launch to Give Access to OTC Products

title: McKesson ideaShare Recognizes Excellence in Community Pharmacy
text: IRVING, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--McKesson ideaShare 2023 drew more than 2,800 attendees including pharmacists, independent pharmacy owners, technicians, exhibitors and staff.

title: 2 Best Buffett Stocks to Buy for the Long Haul

title: McKesson Unveils New Private Brand of Over-the-Counter Pharmacy Products
text: IRVING, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--McKesson today announced the launch of Foster & Thrive™, a curated private brand of over-the-counter (OTC) health and wellness products.

title: McKesson Ventures' Dave Schulte Named One of Healthcare's Top 25 Investors
text: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--McKesson Ventures' managing director Dave Schulte has been recognized by GrowthCap as one of the top 25 healthcare investors for 2023. This award acknowledges healthcare investors who have demonstrated high levels of sustained investment performance, and who are recognized as leaders by portfolio company CEOs, industry peers and colleagues. For two decades, Schulte has been investing in innovative healthcare technology and services businesses focused on improving.

title: McKesson Releases Impact Report
text: IRVING, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--McKesson released its latest Impact Report for fiscal years 2022 and 2023, showcasing our ongoing commitment to advancing health outcomes for all. The report details McKesson's continued efforts to track, measure and communicate our progress in achieving our corporate purpose, with a focus on how we are making an impact with our people, partners, community and planet. title: McKesson Corporation Announces the Expiration and Results of Tender Offer for Any and All 3.796% Notes Due 2024
text: IRVING, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--McKesson Corporation (NYSE: MCK) (the “Company”) today announced that its previously announced offer to purchase for cash (the “Tender Offer”) any and all of its outstanding 3.796% Notes due 2024 (the “2024 Notes”) expired at 5:00 p.m., New York City time, on June 13, 2023 (the “Expiration Time”). As of the Expiration Time, $270,994,000, or 29.52%, of the $918,070,000 aggregate principal amount outstanding of the 2024 Notes had been validly tendered and not valid.

title: McKesson Corporation Announces Pricing Terms of Tender Offer for Any and All 3.796% Notes Due 2024
text: IRVING, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--McKesson Corporation (NYSE:MCK) (the “Company”) today announced the pricing terms of its previously announced offer to purchase for cash (the “Tender Offer”) any and all of its outstanding 3.796% Notes due 2024 (the “2024 Notes”).
